creator: sebastien.blanchet.fr38@gmail.com
text:
Indeed, I have confused 2 ports with similar names:
- sysutils/cpuid
- sysutils/cpuid-etallen

cpuid is a tiny C programs that already works as expected.
I think that this programs does not really need a maintainer because the upstream program has not been updated since 2002.

cpuid-etallen is a bigger program that is still updated regularly by the authors. The associated port has already a maintainer.

In both case, my help to maintain these ports is useless.
So I close this ticket
